book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should be in the north
The hotel should have a star of 2 and should include free wifi
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 5 people and 4 nights starting from friday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the same area as the hotel and should serve chinese food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 18:45 on the same day
If the booking fails how about 17:45
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
